news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday.
The crew is locked in. Excited to co-sponsor the Vibeathon Time to ship

Good Vibes Club Vibeathon from May 15 to June 5  Citizens have been building things in Vibetown, and it felt right to give that energy a real moment with our first hackathon. You've got three weeks to bring whatever you've been thinking about to life. Open to everyone, Citizen or not. The team is cooking
